hook.name: LendingHookV3
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a full-range ETH/ERC20 V4 LP position as a shared vault. LPs deposit and earn swap fees; borrowers draw ETH against TOKEN collateral at 40% LTV; a 0.5% protocol fee is skimmed from each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta hooks, and swaps are blocked in any block where a liquidation occurred.
